title: President Cyril Ramaphosa visits George building collapse site
bodyText:
Breaking News
                            Gallery
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS & VIDEOS - President Ramaphosa's visit has been well received by the many enthused members of the public who cheered from the pavements and surrounding areas at the George Civic Centre.


> After a visit to the disaster site, Ramaphosa entered the City Hall where he will address the family of the deceased workers.


It is a media frenzy of note, with journalists elbowing for a picture of the president.

Ramaphosa is accompanied by a delegation of the Western Cape Government, including Premier Alan Winde and Minister Anton Bredell.

PHOTO GALLERY: President Cyril Ramaphosa visits George building collapse site in Victoria Street

Photo: Lizette da Silva


> VIDEO: President Ramaphosa is briefed by WC Disaster Head Colin Deiner. Video: Michelle Pienaar


Photo: Lizette da Silva


> VIDEO: President Cyril Ramaphosa visits George building collapse site


The President of the Republic of South Africa, Cyril Ramaphosa, took a moment to greet and thank all the rescue workers on site. Pictured is K9-unit's Sergeant Makhosonke and to his right is Sergeant Kotze. The President was accompanied by the Premier of the Western Cape, Alan Winde, and various National and Provincial Ministers. Photograph: Garden Route District Municipality

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
